user.title: HArvest
user.description: Install HArvest to embed live Home Assistant controls on any webpage. Access is controlled via scoped tokens you create in the HArvest panel - no HA credentials are ever exposed to the internet.

abort.already_configured: HArvest is already installed. Only one instance is permitted per Home Assistant installation.

init.title: HArvest Settings
init.description:
All settings are managed in the HArvest panel. Open the panel from the sidebar to configure tokens, view the activity log, and adjust global settings.

[Open HArvest panel]({panel_url})
